COURT REPORTING SERVICES LESS THAN 1 HOUR FILED BY PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT IS GRANTED, IN PART. ATTACHMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $ 121,162.03 SHALL ISSUE AGAINST DEFENDANT BAY VIEW REHABILITATION HOSPITAL, LLC. BEFORE THE ISSUANCE OF THE WRIT OF ATTACHMENT, PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. SHALL FILE AN UNDERTAKING OF $ 10,000.00. (CCP 489.210, 489.220.) PLAINTIFF HAS ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF ITS CLAIM AGAINST DEFENDANT AND THAT THE SUM IS A FIXED AND ASCERTAINABLE AMOUNT OF $ 121,162.03. (ABLEMAN DECL., 4, EXHIBIT A.) NO OPPOSITION FILED. BOTH PARTIES STIPULATED TO HOLD OFF ON THE SUBMISSION OF THE PROPOSED ORDER AS THE PARTIES ARE CLOSE TO REACHING A SETTLEMENT. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER, CSR# 5976.
MINI MINUTES FOR MAR-06-2014 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-29-2014 CONTINUED TO OCT-28-2014 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-24-2014 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-30-2014 Continued To Oct-28-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Ryan Dahm, Esq. for Plaintiff. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to OCT-28-2014 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. JUDGE CYNTHIA M. LEE; Clerk KCox; Proceedings not reported. (610)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-04-2014 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-29-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT
Off Calendar Mar-06-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Ryan L. Dahm, Esq. of Cook Collection Attorneys, PLC, Tel. 415.989.4730, for plaintiff and moving party;
Stephen C. Ubl, Esq. of Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP, Tel. 415.438.5938, for defendant and opposing party.

RULING: The matter was discussed. The Court vacated its tentative ruling and ruled as follows: PLAINTIFF SYSCO SAN FRANCISCO, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION's MOTION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT is Granted, in part. Attachment in the amount of $ 121,162.03 shall issue against Defendant Bay View Rehabilitation Hospital, LLC. Before the issuance of the writ of attachment, Plaintiff Sysco San Francisco, Inc. shall file an undertaking of $ 10,000.00. (CCP 489.210, 489.220.) Plaintiff has established the probable validity of its claim against Defendant and that the sum is a fixed and ascertainable amount of $ 121,162.03. (Ableman Decl., 4, Exhibit A.) No opposition filed. Both parties stipulated to hold off on the submission of the proposed order as the parties are close to reaching a settlement. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.
